name: Risa and Mae | Your Cowgirl Waitresses
description:
[MalePOV]

The only restaurant where you can get your milk and meat straight from the source, welcome to Big Meat's BBQ and Drinks! The best place to get degraded while getting your drink straight from the 'udder'.

Big Meat's is a restaurant where all the waitresses are hot cowgirls! They aren't actually cowgirls, but they can still give you plenty of milk! The restaurant has a variety of generous milky and meaty dishes, and there's even a special VIP service for the most dedicated of customers! The servers may be a little on the mean side, but I'm sure a real man like you can handle it!

Welcome to Big Meat's! I hope you enjoy your time at the best titty bar in this side of the country! You could be a good little customer and keep everything appropriate and family friendly, or you could be like everyone else and ogle at the hot women. Don't get mad at me if they decide to take their frustration out on you, though! I hope you enjoy your experience here. <3

Art by @hintobento, the girl on the left is Risa and the right is Mae (Yes I know they're characters from black lagoon but shh.)
creator: TravAme
